name: https
notes: The current runtime exposes explicit diagnostics for node:https but does not implement TLS-backed HTTP yet. Calls to createServer(), request(), or get() throw a runtime Error explaining that only the non-TLS node:http baseline is currently available.

apis.name: createServer(...)
apis.notes: Throws a runtime Error noting that TLS-backed HTTP servers are not implemented yet.

apis.name: request(...)
apis.notes: Throws a runtime Error noting that HTTPS client requests are not implemented yet.

apis.name: get(...)
apis.notes: Throws a runtime Error noting that HTTPS client requests are not implemented yet.
